pageContext.name: Skeletor Mini Co.
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the Skeletor Mini Co. Collectible Figure from the Mini Co. Series line.  These hand-painted Skeletor collectible figures were created by Iron Studios and are the perfect size for any desk or shelf no matter the size of your collection.  A must-have for fans of Masters of the Universe collectibles!
